AuditOnly.description: Inspect and report the effective Recall state without changing the computer.

UserControlled.description: Remove RecallManager-created policy overrides and return supported choices to Windows and the signed-in user.

SnapshotsOff.description: Keep the Recall component available while policy-blocking snapshot saving for the device and current user.

PrivacyHardened.description: Block Recall availability, block snapshot saving, and disable/remove the optional component.
